samples:
I had a dream I was in the fall
That everything would die away
And when winter comes there is no more
No more need to stay


My heart says don't believe what you see
So why should I feel any pain?
It never ends it seems, this test of time
A fate that cannot be changed

There are times when words fail me clean
When nothing left to say
There are days on end and many more
I can’t find my way back home again


Should I cling to the past
Or do I give up now
Do I try again
While the days goes by somehow?


I have read the lines in sand
The sands flows through the years
This is our task and we shall go
We are faced with failure once more
Nevermore


Gasping for breath but never getting there
A child cries out and calls my name
The sun hangs still as if it knows
Our lives is one second from the end

The years of darkness fade away
And the sun again will shine upon my way
I have found what I was looking for
There is no reason to keep waiting anymore


When winter comes you'll see
Your dreams are false and all subsides to nothing
You promised me in tears that we'd always stay
But now, your eyes saw something strange
It turned out so wrong, it made you nervous


You told me not to come clean
Don't bring up old memories
If they do then run away
As far as you can go
Never trust a friend when everything seems strange
Everything points at you

I am the devil's work
And there's nobody to comfort
I have seen death more than once
And it knows how to torture
A sea of black and smoke rising high above my head
And this time, it won't end yet
"We need one second... "


So you left, without even a word
The light is fading away again
I wish you would turn back around
Just to tell us why you went

She was in the corner, I knew what to do
Her eyes went down and her hair fell around my head
I took a breath, I told her I loved her so much


So why is it always winter?


We all have our reasons for loving someone
When you are alone, your heart would not listen
The moon hangs high in the morning like a ghost on fire
And when it rains, we cry for another


So why is it always winter?


There comes a time when you can't bear to look back
You turn away and there is nothing left here
A child once swore his life unto an idol
Who promised him things but delivered death


So why is it always winter?


One day I will die and return from whence I came
I cannot go home yet I am bound by loyalty
But still this tale goes on without me
It is too late now




Icy roads under the melting snow
And I know that spring is gone forever now
I try to forget but how could I
If the memories last longer than any season


Winter

Aching heart
Waiting for you here forever
This is wrong


You took my breath away and I died a little inside
The sun rose on the other side of me
I heard your voice in the night, the moon was beaming on your face
But when the darkness fell once again it showed nothing but what you've been hiding

There were times I felt like disappearing
Like going under the waves to forget everything
I kept myself close to death
Fading slowly into shadows


It’s never over until the end
And though we all know that life goes on
We carry our burdens with us
In time, this sadness will go away
We are no longer haunted by demons

Asleep alone
Drained from the cold
My body's gone
Never coming home



Lost control
Held your hand
Found my way back through the trees
Came closer to you
While you shant returned


I can see the signs
Even if they change every day
I am still waiting for something
Still believing in you

When you walk in the rain
You are going home to see your friends again


There is a sea of light inside me
The sun is up, I am alive




And there's a new morning coming for us all
A day has come when we can see it through
This is ours and only ours


There is a sea of light inside me
The sun is up, I am alive






Sorrowful journey through lost identity
As time went by so did our friendship die
All that remains is nothing but the void



There is a sea of light inside me
The sun is up, I am alive





A day came when I could not see what I had seen before
Lost sleep, turned away from those who would comfort me
I could not feel my body moved or knew no one cared
Yet I still had dreams where life is waiting for us here




Once within these walls everything was clear as crystal
We have always been here, this place has always been ours
My heart is aching now with joy and grief mingled together
Soaring high like an eagle above the clouds

The days pass us by
And we're just another memory
Once we reach the end
It's all over


There is a voice inside of me
That cries out for you, no
A final goodbye - but it was only sane
To walk away at this point in time


We can not go on anymore
Our hearts are empty and our lives don't matter anymore
All we have left to do is cry ourselves to sleep




We were meant to stay forever
And never leave again
But as the years went by
Nothing ever changed
You kept your secrets to yourself
Never told me why
I would always wait
In the cold and empty halls


When nothing remains after what has been
My eyes will open up
This world I am leaving behind
Is full of deceitful lies
No need to ask why now
As I know the reason why





If we should meet again when everything subsides
Will it be too late?
Do I still carry the mark that you left within me?

I can see her in the distance
It was nothing but a mistake
A night of lust
An obsession with the young
She is not mine and I am not hers


There's no end to this affair
No reason why we should stay
The eyes that would hold me fast
Have drifted away into the vast


In my arms she shivers alone
As if she has seen through all
Of my words, turned around and said
"I never loved you"

There's no need for us to speak now
This instant is just one second
And our thoughts are still too mired down
To be able to keep a secret from the rain

When it rains again I will drown in sorrow
And as I fall asleep I will suffer more than ever before

This final word might seem bizarre
But "I love you", once again I hear her say
Come clean with me, don't ever leave
Don't even ask the question: Why?

The rain is pouring down
And the rivers are rising now
And it's getting colder fast


The mist comes over the water
To cloud our eyes again


We have lost everything
Our trust, weeps away in us
So I'm leaving my home behind


Your voice is carried by the wind
Aching heart is all that's left
In your arms, never to return


I will walk into the night
Into the morning light
When days are new and times are new




Hiding from the sun
Redemption's gone forever
As this was meant only for one


This was meant only for you
This was meant only for you





If I could see you here tonight
You would not leave me be
We'd go out under the stars
Where no one can see us be



But if someone asks you why
You went clean away from here
It was because of me I said
That there were things that I had shared

If I should die tomorrow
I know that you would cry for me
And even if it's the end of all we have been through
You'd still ask why and how


So, don't ever leave now
Take my heart into your hands
Never let go, never say no
Hold my hand, hold me fast
There is so much left to see...


The night is always colder when there is no one here
When everything becomes a memory of what used to be
It is always colder when there is no one here
When nothing lasts forever



Once more I will search in vain
In hopes that someone can explain
Why they take away the only thing I have left
And why do they stay away?

So, don't ever leave now
Take my heart into your hands
Never let go, never say no
Hold my hand, hold me fast
There is so much left to see...


The night is always colder when there is no one here
When everything becomes a memory of what used to be
It is always colder when there is no one here
When nothing lasts forever

The night is long and the day has gone
I walk this road alone


Lost all friends, lost all trust
Lost in a forest of dust


Losing sleep again, it comes too slow
Your words are like poison to my soul


Lost all friends, lost all trust
Lost in a forest of dust


Once the darkness falls I will return
And seize what's mine



There was no time for tears
There was only me inside
I wish you would disappear
Just leave your mark on my mind


One more second could bring me down
You turn away and call me names


This is the end of an era
A new one awaits with open arms
When hope subsides from the heart
It shows us why we don't deserve our dreams




There is always something left behind
There is nothing left here
Never should have come so far
And never can go home now


But there's still another morning waiting
Awaiting your arrival
If you do not believe then depart
If you truly love me stay
